nodes.name: Schoeniparus
nodes.summary: Schoeniparus（Schoeniparus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联7种鸟类，如黄喉雀鹛、栗头雀鹛、黑冠雀鹛等7种鸟类。

nodes.name: 褐胁雀鹛
nodes.summary: The rusty-capped fulvetta (Schoeniparus dubius) is a species of bird in the family Pellorneidae. It is found in Bhutan, China, India, Laos, Myanmar, and Vietnam. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forest. References Collar, N. J. & Robson, C. 2007. Family Timaliidae (Babblers) pp. 70 – 291 in; del Hoyo, J., Elliott, A. & Christie, D.A. eds. Handbook of the Birds of the World, Vol. 12. Picathartes to Tits and Chickadees. Lynx Edicions, Barcelona.
